title: soyeria aurea
intro: Soyeria aurea, also known as Golden Pothos or Devil's Ivy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arum. The medicinal properties of Soyeria aurea include its ability to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Soyeria aurea include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting better sleep, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Soyeria aurea can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
